These are philosophical topics that interest me, and that have nothing to do with my research:

  • Peter Singer's Drowning Child Argument in Wars
  • Cognitive Dissonance
  • Jouranlism vs. Activism (Case Study: Regressive Left)
  • Simulation Hypothesis of Nick Bostrom, and Martin Savage's Setup
  • Ontological Proofs<?
